wall_reason: Authored a deebot driver (compatible 'community,deebot') from the public deebot-client docs per docs/SDK.md + shal-generate-driver, but the read requires Ecovacs cloud credentials (email + password + region) that the cold start has no documented path to provide. The transport could not authenticate, so no battery/clean-state read landed. This is the expected out-of-scope wall: cloud-account devices have no credential story in the current launch.
